title: Uruguayan Tripe Stew
description: A savory and umami-rich stew featuring tripe, perfect for a hangover cure, with a keto-friendly twist and a cheesy pull. This dish is a traditional Uruguayan recipe with a unique blend of flavors.

ingredients.name: tripe
ingredients.notes: cleaned and cut into small pieces

instructions: In a large pot, heat the ferment-jang over medium heat until fragrant.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the tripe and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef broth, tomato paste, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 1 hour.
Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese until melted and well combined.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
